response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience beyond early career roles, has no evidence of 8+ years in C++ programming as required, and shows no experience with cloud compute platforms, distributed systems, or infrastructure leadership — instead focusing on web, mobile, and open-source GIS tools using TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across multiple languages and domains
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in testing and dev practices
Active open-source contributions and community engagement
concerns: No evidence of 8 years of C++ experience as mandatory requirement
Lacks demonstrated experience in cloud compute platforms or large-scale infrastructure
No prior technical leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
